name: tasktime
description: TaskTime Pro helps freelancers and small teams manage client work from tasks and timers through expenses, quotes, invoices, and reports. This skill lets agents organize projects, find unbilled work, prepare drafts, review business data, manage multiple timers, set tasks, and open the right app screens while keeping sensitive actions visible and approval-gated.

interface.shortDescription: Manage TaskTime Pro projects, tasks, timers, expenses, invoices, quotes, and reports with agent help.
interface.longDescription: TaskTime Pro helps freelancers and small teams manage client work from tasks and timers through expenses, quotes, invoices, and reports. This skill lets agents organize projects, find unbilled work, prepare drafts, review business data, manage multiple timers, set tasks, and open the right app screens while keeping sensitive actions visible and approval-gated.
defaultPrompt: Set up TaskTime Pro agent access.
List my TaskTime Pro projects and active timers.
Draft an invoice from unbilled TaskTime Pro work.
